name: Ascend Configuration Management Interface
description: Two-tier configuration system for Ascend that manages defaults and user overrides stored in ~/.ascend/config.yaml. Provides functions to load, save, and manipulate configuration values with type coercion support for int and list types. Filters None values from YAML before model construction.

types.name: AscendConfig

fields.name: anthropic_api_key_env
fields.description: Environment variable name for Anthropic API key

fields.name: default_lookback_hours
fields.description: Default number of hours to look back

fields.name: linear_api_key_env
fields.description: Environment variable name for Linear API key

fields.name: slack_bot_token_env
fields.description: Environment variable name for Slack bot token

types.description: Pydantic model representing the complete Ascend configuration with default values

functions.name: load_config
functions.description: Load configuration from YAML file, falling back to defaults if file does not exist. Filters out None values from YAML before constructing AscendConfig.

inputs.name: config_path
inputs.description: Optional path to config file, defaults to ~/.ascend/config.yaml

error_cases.name: yaml_parse_error
error_cases.condition: YAML file is malformed or invalid

error_cases.name: pydantic_validation_error
error_cases.condition: Loaded YAML data fails Pydantic validation

error_cases.name: file_permission_error
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to read config file

error_cases.name: io_error
error_cases.condition: File system I/O error during read

postconditions: Returns AscendConfig instance with either loaded values or defaults
None values from YAML are filtered out before model construction

structured_side_effects.description: Reads from filesystem if config file exists

functions.name: save_config
functions.description: Save AscendConfig instance to YAML file. Creates parent directories if they don't exist.

inputs.name: config_path
inputs.description: Optional path to config file, defaults to ~/.ascend/config.yaml

error_cases.name: file_permission_error
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to write config file or create directories

error_cases.name: io_error
error_cases.condition: File system I/O error during write

preconditions: cfg must be a valid AscendConfig instance
postconditions: Config file exists at specified path
Parent directories are created if they don't exist
YAML file contains serialized config data without flow style, unsorted keys

structured_side_effects.description: Creates directories if they don't exist

functions.name: get_config_value
functions.description: Get a single configuration value by key. Loads config if not provided, converts value to string.

inputs.name: cfg
inputs.description: Optional AscendConfig instance, loads from file if None

error_cases.name: unknown_key_error
error_cases.condition: key does not exist in AscendConfig fields

error_cases.name: yaml_parse_error
error_cases.condition: Config file is malformed when loading (if cfg is None)

error_cases.name: pydantic_validation_error
error_cases.condition: Loaded config data fails validation (if cfg is None)

preconditions: key must exist in AscendConfig fields
postconditions: Returns string representation of config value
Converts all values to string, even non-string types

structured_side_effects.description: Calls load_config() if cfg is None

functions.name: set_config_value
functions.description: Set a single configuration value by key with automatic type coercion, then save to file. Coerces value to int if current value is int, or to list[str] (comma-separated) if current value is list.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: New value as string (will be coerced to appropriate type)

inputs.name: config_path
inputs.description: Optional path to config file, defaults to ~/.ascend/config.yaml

error_cases.name: unknown_key_error
error_cases.condition: key does not exist in AscendConfig fields

error_cases.name: int_conversion_error
error_cases.condition: value cannot be converted to int when current field is int type

error_cases.name: pydantic_validation_error
error_cases.condition: Updated config data fails Pydantic validation

error_cases.name: file_permission_error
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to read or write config file

error_cases.name: io_error
error_cases.condition: File system I/O error during read or write

preconditions: key must exist in AscendConfig fields
postconditions: Config value is updated with type coercion applied
Updated config is saved to file
Integer fields are coerced via int(value)
List fields are coerced via comma-split and strip whitespace

invariants: _DEFAULTS dictionary defines fallback values for all config fields
Config files are always YAML format with default_flow_style=False
None values from YAML are always filtered before model construction
All config values are convertible to string representation
Type coercion for set_config_value only handles int and list types explicitly
